posts.author: ChrisCollings (Chris Collings)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have an integration set up to send a specific email once a status changes. For some reason there was a glitch and the integration sent the email to another person’s email address.
Our customer who is called Lisa is rurious we’ve referred to her as Brian. It’s really not good, is there any reason why this has happened?

Thank you in advance

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @ChrisCollings ,

I would suggest you to check the native integration.

You can use Make as a solution to prevent such glitches in the future and improve the integration process.

posts.cookedHtml:
@MsquareAutomation thank you for your feedback. We eventually found what the issue was and it is now resolved.
Yes Make is a good tool, we are currently exploring its benefits.
